task: Define an async effect and write a function that spawns two concurrent tasks and joins their results
Write a thread-safe counter using Arc and atomic operations

tests.input: v c = AtomicCounter.new(); c.increment(); c.increment(); c.get()

task: Write a producer-consumer pattern using a channel effect
Write a function that applies a mapper in parallel to each element of a Vec and collects results
Write a function that uses a Mutex-like exclusive lock to safely accumulate values from multiple tasks
Write a timeout wrapper that cancels a computation after a deadline
Write a rate limiter that allows at most N operations per second using a token bucket
Write a barrier that blocks until N tasks have arrived, then releases all of them
Write a concurrent map-reduce: split data, process chunks in parallel, merge results

tests.input: map_reduce([1,2,3,4], 2, fn(x) => x as i64, fn(a,b) => a + b, 0)

task: Write an async semaphore that limits concurrent access to a resource to N permits

tests.input: v s = Semaphore.new(2); s.acquire(); s.acquire(); s.release()
